CustomField.formula:
IF( OR( AND( ZImportTimeStamp__c="13.4.2017 00:00:00", ZImportSource__c ="PrintPlus" ), AND( ZImportTimeStamp__c="2017-04-13", ZImportSource__c ="PrintPlus" ) ), IMAGE("/resource/1492347261000/migration_red", "Migration PP"),
IF( ZImportSource__c ="Abacus20170408", IMAGE("/resource/1490794124000/icon_abacus15","Migration Abacus"), ""))
CustomField.label: Source
